ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: FORMAGGIO 60% (LATTE vaccino, sale, caglio, conservante: lisozima (proteina da UOVO)), PATATE 30%, SPECK 10% (coscia di suino, sale, pepe, piante aromatiche, conservante: E252).
